optimization.note: 2D grid search (144 points) showed β₁ᵦ irrelevant. Golden section search (11 evals) on β₁ₐ with β₁ᵦ=0 found optimum at 0.116.

loss.note: Prefill compute-only: β₁ₐ=0.116·T_pf_compute (β₁ᵦ=0, memory term dropped). Verified 39.86 on 15/15 experiments.

key_finding: Prefill is compute-dominated: dropping the memory term entirely (β₁ᵦ=0) costs only 0.05 loss. β₁ₐ=0.116 implies 8.6× prefill compute discount, consistent with FlashAttention-2 reducing effective FLOPs.
